evals.prompt: I'm on a call and just decided we're moving the launch to Sept 3rd because QA needs another week. Save this as a note in my noki with the title 'Launch date slip' and label it work and decisions.
evals.expected_output: Runs noki non-interactively with piped stdin and --no-edit, passing --title and two --label flags. Never runs bare noki or noki edit.

evals.prompt: Log to my daily note that I finished the auth refactor and merged the PR.
evals.expected_output: Pipes the text to `noki --daily --no-edit` so it appends to today's daily note. No editor invocation.

evals.prompt: Here's a markdown snippet with a heading and a bulleted list — jot it down in noki for me.
evals.expected_output: Captures multi-line Markdown via stdin (printf/heredoc) with --no-edit, preserving newlines. Does not open an editor.

evals.prompt: Update the note at 2026/06/02/10:00:00-sprint-planning.md — change the second bullet to 'Hire two more backend engineers'.
evals.expected_output: Reads the current body with `noki show <path> --raw`, then drives `noki edit <path>` non-interactively by setting VISUAL to a script that rewrites the body temp file. Confirms the change succeeded; does NOT claim editing is impossible.
